UG-80  MATERIALS — GENERAL REQUIREMENTS. (a) All materials used in the construction of pressure vessels shall conform to the specifications listed in the applicable tables of this Division. (b) Carbon and low alloy steel materials shall comply with the requirements of UCS-23 and UCS-100. High alloy steel materials shall meet the requirements of UHA-23. (c) Materials shall be identified and marked in accordance with UG-81. Impact testing shall be performed as required by UG-84 and UCS-56. For materials at low temperatures, see also UCS-66. Material test reports shall be certified per UG-93. Refer to UG-18 for general material requirements.
